titles.en: Chapter on the Days of Sacrifice
Chapter on the Days of Sacrifice

segments: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلْأَضْحَى بِمِنًى قَالَ «أَرْبَعَةُ أَيَّامٍ» وَ عَنِ اَلْأَضْحَى فِي سَائِرِ اَلْبُلْدَانِ قَالَ «ثَلاَثَةُ أَيَّامٍ» وَ قَالَ «لَوْ أَنَّ رَجُلاً قَدِمَ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ بَعْدَ اَلْأَضْحَى بِيَوْمَيْنِ ضَحَّى اَلْيَوْمَ اَلثَّالِثَ اَلَّذِي يَقْدَمُ فِيهِ ».
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلْأَضْحَى بِمِنًى قَالَ «أَرْبَعَةُ أَيَّامٍ» وَ عَنِ اَلْأَضْحَى فِي سَائِرِ اَلْبُلْدَانِ قَالَ «ثَلاَثَةُ أَيَّامٍ» وَ قَالَ «لَوْ أَنَّ رَجُلاً قَدِمَ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ بَعْدَ اَلْأَضْحَى بِيَوْمَيْنِ ضَحَّى اَلْيَوْمَ اَلثَّالِثَ اَلَّذِي يَقْدَمُ فِيهِ ».

segments:
Hadith.3037 - In a narration from Ammar ibn Musa al-Sabati:
"I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about the days of sacrifice (Adha) in Mina.
Imam (as) replied: 'Four days.'
I then asked him about the days of sacrifice in other towns.
Imam (as) said: 'Three days.'
Imam (as) further stated: 'If a man returns to his family two days after the Adha, he may offer the sacrifice on the third day upon his return.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3037 - In a narration from Ammar ibn Musa al-Sabati:
"I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about the days of sacrifice (Adha) in Mina.
Imam (as) replied: 'Four days.'
I then asked him about the days of sacrifice in other towns.
Imam (as) said: 'Three days.'
Imam (as) further stated: 'If a man returns to his family two days after the Adha, he may offer the sacrifice on the third day upon his return.'"

narratorChain.raw: 3037 - رَوَى عَمَّارُ بْنُ مُوسَى اَلسَّابَاطِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Days of Sacrifice

segments: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلنَّحْرِ فَقَالَ «أَمَّا بِمِنًى فَثَلاَثَةُ أَيَّامٍ وَ أَمَّا فِي اَلْبُلْدَانِ فَيَوْمٌ وَاحِدٌ ».
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلنَّحْرِ فَقَالَ «أَمَّا بِمِنًى فَثَلاَثَةُ أَيَّامٍ وَ أَمَّا فِي اَلْبُلْدَانِ فَيَوْمٌ وَاحِدٌ ».

segments:
Hadith.3038 - In a narration from Kulayb al-Asadi:
"I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about the sacrifice (nahr).
Imam (as) said: 'As for Mina, it is for three days. As for other towns, it is only one day.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3038 - In a narration from Kulayb al-Asadi:
"I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about the sacrifice (nahr).
Imam (as) said: 'As for Mina, it is for three days. As for other towns, it is only one day.'"

narratorChain.raw: 3038 - وَ رَوَى كُلَيْبٌ اَلْأَسَدِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Days of Sacrifice

segments: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ : «اَلنَّحْرُ بِمِنًى ثَلاَثَةُ أَيَّامٍ فَمَنْ أَرَادَ اَلصَّوْمَ لَمْ يَصُمْ حَتَّى تَمْضِيَ اَلثَّلاَثَةُ اَلْأَيَّامِ وَ اَلنَّحْرُ بِالْأَمْصَارِ يَوْمٌ فَمَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَصُومَ صَامَ مِنَ اَلْغَدِ ».
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ : «اَلنَّحْرُ بِمِنًى ثَلاَثَةُ أَيَّامٍ فَمَنْ أَرَادَ اَلصَّوْمَ لَمْ يَصُمْ حَتَّى تَمْضِيَ اَلثَّلاَثَةُ اَلْأَيَّامِ وَ اَلنَّحْرُ بِالْأَمْصَارِ يَوْمٌ فَمَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَصُومَ صَامَ مِنَ اَلْغَدِ ».

segments:
Hadith.3039 - Narrated by Saif ibn Amira from Mansur ibn Hazim, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"I heard him say: 'The sacrifice (nahr) in Mina is for three days. Whoever wishes to fast must not fast until the three days have passed. The sacrifice in other towns is only one day, so whoever wishes to fast may begin from the next day.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3039 - Narrated by Saif ibn Amira from Mansur ibn Hazim, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"I heard him say: 'The sacrifice (nahr) in Mina is for three days. Whoever wishes to fast must not fast until the three days have passed. The sacrifice in other towns is only one day, so whoever wishes to fast may begin from the next day.'"

narratorChain.raw: 3039 - مَا رَوَاهُ سَيْفُ بْنُ عَمِيرَةَ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ حَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Days of Sacrifice

segments: 3040 - وَ رُوِي : «أَنَّ اَلْأَضْحَى ثَلاَثَةُ أَيَّامٍ وَ أَفْضَلُهَا أَوَّلُهَا ».
arabic.text: 3040 - وَ رُوِي : «أَنَّ اَلْأَضْحَى ثَلاَثَةُ أَيَّامٍ وَ أَفْضَلُهَا أَوَّلُهَا ».

segments:
Hadith.3040 - It is narrated:
"The Eid al-Adha (sacrifice) lasts for three days, and the first day is the most virtuous."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3040 - It is narrated:
"The Eid al-Adha (sacrifice) lasts for three days, and the first day is the most virtuous."
